title: Operator loop scratch evidence status hook
problem: After ticket-071, operators can run probe-scratch-evidence-review manually, but the bounded operator loop does not surface scratch DB presence, row counts, or evidence-review readiness in plan mode.
acceptance_criteria: operator_loop --mode plan reports scratch DB path, existence, and reviewed row count when readable.
Plan mode remains read-only; no scratch or graph DB writes.
Missing or invalid scratch DB reported honestly without crashing plan mode.
Existing operator loop tests pass; new unit tests cover scratch status fields.
non_goals: No auto-persist or auto evidence review generation.
No public export or site changes.
No queue mutation from operator loop.
rollback_plan: Revert operator loop scratch status fields and tests.
